title: Romance in the Dark
writer: Frank Partos, Anne Morrison Chapin, Hermann Bahr
actors: Gladys Swarthout, John Boles, John Barrymore
plot: "Romance in the Dark" is a 1938 film directed by H. C. Potter and starring Gladys Swarthout, John Boles, John Barrymore, and Claire Dodd. It is one of five movies produced by Paramount in the 1930s featuring Gladys Swarthout, a po...
